title: French couple leave Iran after more than three years in jail
summary_full: Cecile Kohler and Jacques Paris are on their way home after being allowed to leave the country, the French president says.
summary_public: Cecile Kohler and Jacques Paris are on their way home after being allowed to leave the country, the French president says.
